name: Tomato Sweet Pepper Ketchup
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Fresh or canned tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the water or stock, garlic, onion, and oregano. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan and cook over medium-low heat for 20-30 minutes until thickened.
3. Transfer all ingredients to a food processor and process until smooth.
4. To further thicken, return mixture to the pot and cook over medium-low heat for an additional 10 minutes, or until reduced to desired thickness.
5. Ensure that the ketchup does not scorch on the bottom of the pan. This will keep well for 2 weeks in the refrigerator or longer frozen.
